category_sources: Official GitHub README describes tpix as a simple terminal image viewer compatible with Kitty graphics protocol.
source_facts.description says it is a terminal image viewer using the Kitty graphics protocol.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository is jesvedberg/tpix and README heading uses tpix.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository contains a docs directory.
Official README includes installation, usage, and help output.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated; repo intentionally not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README states tpix is written in Nim and uses the Kitty graphics protocol.
source_facts.description identifies CLI terminal image-viewer purpose.
